content:
Master Maths Rosebank — Mathematics & Science Tutoring

Master Maths is one of South Africa's largest private tutoring franchise networks, specialising in Mathematics and Physical Science for Grade 4 to Grade 12 learners. If you're searching for Master Maths in Rosebank, Johannesburg, this guide covers what Master Maths offers, how to find your nearest centre, and additional tutoring options available in the Rosebank area.

About Master Maths

Master Maths uses a computer-based, self-paced learning system combined with qualified tutors to help learners build confidence and improve their marks in Mathematics and Physical Science. Key features include:

  • 📱 Computer-based learning — Interactive multimedia lessons that explain concepts step by step
  • 👨‍🏫 Qualified tutors — Experienced mathematics and science tutors guide learners through the material
  • 📊 Progress tracking — Regular assessments and progress reports for parents
  • 📚 CAPS-aligned curriculum — Content directly linked to the South African school curriculum
  • 🏫 Grades 4–12 — Support for primary and high school learners
  • ⏰ Flexible session times — Afternoons and Saturdays at most centres

Finding Master Maths Near Rosebank, Johannesburg

Rosebank is a suburban hub in northern Johannesburg with several tutoring options nearby. To find the closest Master Maths centre to Rosebank:

  1. Visit the Master Maths website: mastermaths.co.za
  2. Use the "Find a Centre" tool — Enter "Rosebank" or your suburb to locate the nearest franchise
  3. Call Master Maths: 0861 628 666 — They will direct you to the nearest Johannesburg North or central Johannesburg centre

🔗 Find a Master Maths centre near Rosebank → mastermaths.co.za

Master Maths Nearby Centres — Johannesburg North Area

The Rosebank area is well-served by Master Maths centres in surrounding suburbs. Centres typically operating in the broader Johannesburg North/Central area include locations in:

  • Sandton / Hyde Park — Close to Rosebank, suitable for learners in the Rosebank corridor
  • Parktown / Parkview — South of Rosebank, convenient for nearby learners
  • Randburg — Northwest of Rosebank
  • Fourways / Lonehill — Further north on the N1 highway
  • Bryanston — Northeast of Rosebank

Use the Master Maths centre finder at mastermaths.co.za for exact addresses and contact details of the nearest centres, as franchise locations change periodically.

What Subjects Does Master Maths Offer?

SubjectGrades Covered
MathematicsGrades 4–12
Physical SciencesGrades 10–12
Mathematical LiteracyGrades 10–12
Natural SciencesGrades 4–9

Master Maths Fees — What to Expect

Master Maths fees vary by franchise, but are generally charged on a monthly subscription basis. Learners typically attend 2 sessions per week. Contact your nearest Rosebank-area Master Maths centre directly for current pricing, as fees are set by individual franchise owners and subject to annual adjustment.

As a guide, Master Maths monthly fees across South Africa typically range from R800 to R1,500+ per month, depending on location and grade level.

Alternative: 24/7 AI Maths Tutoring with StudyBuddy

If you're looking for affordable, on-demand maths and science tutoring to complement Master Maths sessions — or as a standalone option — StudyBuddy's AI tutor is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

StudyBuddy helps Rosebank learners with:

  • 📐 Mathematics — Algebra, functions, calculus, trigonometry, statistics, and more for Grades 8–12
  • ⚗️ Physical Sciences — Physics and Chemistry concepts, equations, and exam prep
  • 📖 All CAPS subjects — English, Life Sciences, Accounting, Economics, History, Geography
  • 🧪 Exam preparation — Past paper practice, topic summaries, and step-by-step solutions
  • 🏠 Available at home — No travel to a centre; accessible from any smartphone or computer

StudyBuddy is available from R99/month — significantly more affordable than in-person tutoring — and most learners improve their marks by 20–30% within a few weeks.

👉 Try StudyBuddy AI tutoring free — no card required →

Tips for Improving Maths Results — Grade 12 Rosebank Learners

  • ✏️ Do past papers — Practise NSC past papers from 2017–2024 under timed conditions
  • 📅 Study consistently — 30–60 minutes of maths every day is more effective than cramming
  • ❓ Ask questions immediately — Don't let misunderstood concepts pile up; use your tutor or StudyBuddy to resolve gaps quickly
  • 📝 Show all working — NSC examiners award marks for method, even if the final answer is wrong
  • 🔁 Review errors — When you get something wrong, understand why before moving on

👉 Find bursaries for high-achieving learners in Johannesburg →

⚠️ Disclaimer: StudyBuddy is an independent student support platform. We are not affiliated with Master Maths (Pty) Ltd or any of its franchise owners. Master Maths is a registered trademark of its respective owner. Centre information provided is general — always verify locations and fees directly at mastermaths.co.za.

faqs.question: Is there a Master Maths centre in Rosebank, Johannesburg?
faqs.answer: Master Maths operates a nationwide network of franchise centres. To find the Master Maths centre closest to Rosebank, use the 'Find a Centre' tool at mastermaths.co.za or call 0861 628 666. Nearby areas with Master Maths centres include Sandton, Parktown, Randburg, and Bryanston.

faqs.question: What grades does Master Maths cover?
faqs.answer: Master Maths covers Mathematics for Grades 4–12 and Physical Sciences for Grades 10–12. They also offer Mathematical Literacy (Grades 10–12) and Natural Sciences (Grades 4–9). The programme uses computer-based lessons with qualified tutors.

faqs.question: How much does Master Maths cost per month?
faqs.answer: Master Maths fees vary by franchise location but typically range from R800 to R1,500+ per month, usually covering 2 sessions per week. Contact your nearest centre directly for current fees as they are set by individual franchise owners.

faqs.question: What is a cheaper alternative to Master Maths in Rosebank?
faqs.answer: StudyBuddy's AI tutor provides 24/7 mathematics and science tutoring from R99/month — much more affordable than in-person tutoring. It's available on any smartphone or computer, so Rosebank learners don't need to travel to a centre. Many students use StudyBuddy alongside their Master Maths sessions for extra support.

faqs.question: How do I contact Master Maths?
faqs.answer: You can contact Master Maths at 0861 628 666 or via their website at mastermaths.co.za. Use the 'Find a Centre' tool to locate the centre nearest to Rosebank, Johannesburg, and contact them directly for enrolment and fee information.
